command_or_method: curl -sS -D - -o /dev/null <url>

notes: www HTTP entry uses a 2-hop chain (http->https same host, then host canonicalization); each hop is a safe 301 upgrade

tool: Dapachecker DA/PA + DR/UR (manual run by project owner, exported xlsx)
command_or_method: Owner ran dapachecker.org and dapachecker.org/dr-ur-checker manually (CAPTCHA-gated, not agent-solvable); xlsx exports parsed by the auditor
result_summary: DR 0.4, UR 4 (Ahrefs-derived); DA 6, PA 18, Spam Score 7%, domain age 7 years 5 months (Moz-derived). Cross-check via SEO Review Tools (Semrush-derived, agent-run): DA 2, PA 8, 207 external links to domain, 163 to page. Key reading: DR 0.4 on a 7.5-year-old domain = established domain that never accumulated links; Spam Score 7% = healthy, so the problem is link ABSENCE, not toxicity (strategy = acquisition, not disavow). The 207 link count is inconsistent with DR 0.4 and must not be used as link-profile evidence.
raw_artifact: working/authority-backlinks.md §1; source xlsx in owner's Downloads
notes: Quantifies the qualitative 'near-zero authority' claim in SEO-EXT-001. TF/CF/Majestic not obtained (registration) - limitation. Competitor baseline NOT obtained (CAPTCHA + rate limit) - TASK-0019

command_or_method: Fetch page and extract outbound links for the community listing
result_summary: CORRECTS a prior auditor inference. The listing describes the community in detail (purpose, leadership, international congresses) and ranks #2 in Google for the brand query, but contains NO outbound link to caminodeldharma.org. Confirms the pattern across three authoritative topical sources: Buddhistdoor (links only to Facebook), EcoEspiritualidad (no link), budismo.com directory (not listed).
notes: seo-external.md §8 had recorded this as an 'existing citation/backlink' - that was inferred from the SERP, not verified. Corrected.

Website/URL age reported N/A by this tool (Dapachecker remains the source for domain age: 7y5m).

tool: SEO Review Tools Website Authority Checker (manual runs by project owner, 5 CSV exports)
target: competitor baseline: budismocolombia.org, sotozencolombia.org, centroyamantaka.org, meditacionencolombia.org, budismocolombia.co
profile: same tool, same date as the audited domain — comparability satisfied
command_or_method: Owner ran the CAPTCHA-gated tool manually per domain and exported CSV; archived under raw/seo-external/seoreviewtools-competitor-*.csv
result_summary: DA: sotozencolombia 20, budismocolombia.co 18, meditacionencolombia 17, budismocolombia.org 8, centroyamantaka 8 vs caminodeldharma 2. Competitor DA min 8 / median 17 / max 20 — NO dominant high-authority player exists in this niche; gaps are 6 points to the nearest rung, 15 to the median, 18 to the leader. KEY: budismocolombia.org has 214 external links (vs 207 for caminodeldharma) yet DA 8 vs DA 2 — same volume, 4x authority, so the deficit is link QUALITY/diversity, not count. The two sites that dominated the question-form and local SERPs (meditacionencolombia DA17/PA51, sotozencolombia DA20/PA42) are exactly the ones combining high DA and PA. ALSO: all six domains report Social shares 0, revealing that metric is not collected by the tool — invalidates the earlier site-specific reading.
notes: Closes limitation 14 (competitor baseline). Establishes DA 8 as first realistic milestone, DA 15-17 as second. Corrects the social-shares interpretation in EVID-0045.

tool: PageSpeed Insights / Lighthouse 13.4.0 (report generated by project owner, read by auditor)
profile: Moto G Power emulated, slow-4G throttling, HeadlessChromium 149.0.7827.155
command_or_method: Owner ran PSI and shared the analysis URL; auditor read the cached report (PSI API quota exhausted)
result_summary: Scores: Performance 99, Accessibility 100, Best Practices 100, SEO 100, Agentic Navigation 3/3. Lab metrics: FCP 0.9s, LCP 1.4s (GOOD — previously NOT_VERIFIED, closes the audit's largest measurement gap), TBT 0ms, CLS 0.081 (good but CORRECTS the 0 recorded by the audit's unthrottled pane measurement), Speed Index 1.0s. INP still unavailable (requires field data). CrUX field data: 'No hay datos' — origin below the traffic threshold, which independently corroborates the external-SEO diagnosis. Opportunities: image delivery 185 KiB (independently corroborates PERF-001), render-blocking requests 450ms (NEW), minify CSS 3 KiB (NEW), cache lifetimes 1 KiB. Best-practices flags corroborate SEC-001 (HSTS) and SEC-002 (CSP).
notes: Closes limitation 1 (LCP) for lab; limitation 2 (INP) remains open pending field data. Agentic Navigation 3/3 independently corroborates the ASO/AEO conclusion that the technical layer passes.

tool: PageSpeed Insights / Lighthouse 13.4.0 (report generated by project owner, read by auditor)
command_or_method: Owner shared the desktop tab of the same cached analysis; auditor extracted values from the DOM
result_summary: Desktop: Performance 100, Accessibility 100, Best Practices 100, SEO 100, Agentic Navigation 3/3. FCP 0.3s, LCP 0.4s, TBT 0ms, CLS 0.005, SI 0.3s. Opportunities: render-blocking 200ms, image delivery 42 KiB, minify CSS 3 KiB, cache 1 KiB. KEY COMPARISON vs mobile: image savings 42 KiB desktop vs 185 KiB mobile (4.4x) confirms the missing srcset in PERF-001 — mobile receives images sized for large screens. CLS 0.005 desktop vs 0.081 mobile (16x) shows the layout shift is mobile-viewport specific, contradicting the audit's original 'CLS 0 on both profiles'. No CrUX field data on either profile.
notes: Completes the performance area across both form factors. CLS mobile-specific shift stays below the 0.1 threshold so it is not raised to a finding, but is flagged for watch.

tool: Google Search (browser pane, hl=es gl=co) + git blame + project voice docs
command_or_method: Google query 'comunidad buddhista colombia'; git blame/log -S on index.html tagline; read docs/08-voice-dictionary.md and docs/21
result_summary: Google does NOT auto-correct 'buddhista' to 'budista' (no spelling-correction notice) yet returns essentially the SAME result set (budismocolombia.org, sotozencolombia.org, bogota.gov.co, budismocolombia.co, buddhistdoor, meditacionencolombia.org) — the engine resolves both spellings to the same intent, so the editorial spelling choice carries negligible SEO cost. Site absent from page 1 under both spellings, consistent with SEO-EXT-001. Provenance: the visible tagline 'Comunidad budista Chan…' was ADDED (not modified) by the owner's own commit fbb9e05 on 2026-07-18, two days before this audit continuation; 'buddhista Chan y Tierra Pura' never existed in git history. Project voice docs mandate double-d ('Buddhismo … usar con consistencia'), so the tagline deviated from the project's own editorial standard.
notes: Not attributable to the audit. Informs the keyword-opportunity map: both spellings are legitimate targets serving different audiences.
